'''tafuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:encephalization|encephalization]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-f-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:encephalization|encephalization]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tafuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæfiyith|tæfiyith]] || [[word:tæfiyij|tæfiyij]] || [[word:tæfiyish|tæfiyish]] || [[word:tæfiyi|tæfiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tafufuyuth|tafufuyuth]] || [[word:tafufuyuj|tafufuyuj]] || [[word:tafufuyush|tafufuyush]] || [[word:tafufuyu|tafufuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tafuyuth|tafuyuth]] || [[word:tafuyuj|tafuyuj]] || [[word:tafuyush|tafuyush]] || [[word:tafuyu|tafuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tafufyuth|tafufyuth]] || [[word:tafufyuj|tafufyuj]] || [[word:tafufyush|tafufyush]] || [[word:tafufyuf|tafufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tafuyuthu|tafuyuthu]] || [[word:tafuyuju|tafuyuju]] || [[word:tafuyushu|tafuyushu]] || [[word:tafuyuku|tafuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tafuyuth|tafuyuth]] || [[word:tafuyuj|tafuyuj]] || [[word:tafuyush|tafuyush]] || [[word:tafuyu|tafuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tafuyuthul|tafuyuthul]] || [[word:tafuyujul|tafuyujul]] || [[word:tafuyushul|tafuyushul]] || [[word:tafuyukul|tafuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tafuyuthuthu|tafuyuthuthu]] || [[word:tafuyujuju|tafuyujuju]] || [[word:tafuyushushu|tafuyushushu]] || [[word:tafuyuku|tafuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tafuyuthun|tafuyuthun]] || [[word:tafuyujun|tafuyujun]] || [[word:tafuyushun|tafuyushun]] || [[word:tafuyukun|tafuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tafuyuthuoro|tafuyuthuoro]] || [[word:tafuyujuoro|tafuyujuoro]] || [[word:tafuyushuoro|tafuyushuoro]] || [[word:tafuyukuoro|tafuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
